---
id: get-section
title: "Retrieve section text by UUID"
description: "Returns one section payload including taxonomy IDs and XML content."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Retrieve section text by UUID"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/sections/{section_uuid}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns one section payload including taxonomy IDs and XML content.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
